## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature solves. e.g. "As a student, I can't see my progress history because..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why you ruled them out.

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Additional Context

Any mockups, related issues, or external references.
